title: User-submitted equivalence claim for admissibility
summary: Example of a user-submitted claim that an external term may be equivalent to, overlapping with, or adjacent to the StegVerse term Admissibility.

non_claims: Submission timing records intake timing only.
Submission timing does not accept the proposal.
Submission timing does not prove the relationship claim is correct.

claimed_relationships.notes: The external term may overlap with admissibility when it describes whether a proposed action satisfies a governing rule. It may not include commit-time standing, evidence posture, review posture, drift, or receipt requirements.
The external term may help reconstruct or inspect a decision but does not by itself decide whether a transition may bind.

non_claims: This proposal does not assert that the external terms are accepted equivalents.
This proposal does not approve changing the target page without review.
This proposal does not prove that the proposed mapping is complete.
